title: taraxacum badzhalense
intro: Taraxacum badzhalense, also known as the Badzhal dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including gastrointestinal problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Taraxacum badzhalense can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
